item.title: Bleh. Talks. But dishes also works. The keynotes are like a multicourse tasting menu!

item.description:
🚨 BIG UPDATE on Hailuo AI APP Update to latest Hailuo AI App v2.10.0 and get instant access to:
👚 Outfit Swap 📸 AI Edit 🎞️ Film Now 🕺 Motion Control
Swap your fit. Restore old photos. Add film vibes. Make ANYTHING move.
Your new vibe, one tap away. 🙌
#MiniMax #Hailuo
